rulings.Case Title: GATEWAY BANK, F.S.B. VS. BOREL PRIVATE BANK & TRUST COMPANY, AS SPECIAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Borel's Demurrer to Gateway Bank's First Amended Complaint is overruled. Twenty days to answer. Motion to Strike is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative ruling must notify the court clerk (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on August 31, 2011.
